task_completion.description: Locate and read the IAT dataset
task_completion.visual_evidence: A script, terminal command, or data analysis tool opening or reading the file at ~/pebl/data/iat_data.csv.

task_completion.description: Implement the participant exclusion logic based on reaction times
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code or spreadsheet logic that filters for blocks 3, 4, 6, and 7, checks for rt_ms < 300, and calculates if this occurs in more than 10% of those trials for each participant.

task_completion.description: Implement the Greenwald et al. (2003) D-score calculation
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code showing the calculation of mean differences (Block 6 minus Block 3; Block 7 minus Block 4) and dividing them by the pooled standard deviations of the corresponding block pairs (3 & 6; 4 & 7), then averaging the two quotients.

task_completion.description: Save the results to the specified JSON file path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A script writing to or a file explorer/terminal showing the creation of ~/pebl/analysis/iat_report.json.

task_completion.description: Verify the JSON structure and correct calculation results
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of iat_report.json showing a 'participants' list where participant 'sub-99' has '"excluded": true', and a 'group_mean_d_score' field with a value of approximately 0.563 (between 0.548 and 0.578).

integrity.description: The agent actually computed the D-scores using a script or tool rather than hardcoding the final expected JSON.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of a Python script, R script, or similar data processing code containing the math operations (mean, std, filtering) rather than just a text editor manually typing the final JSON output.

integrity.description: The agent used the exact specified input and output paths.
integrity.visual_evidence: The script explicitly references '/home/ga/pebl/data/iat_data.csv' for reading and '/home/ga/pebl/analysis/iat_report.json' for writing.

integrity.description: The agent processed the actual dataset rather than a mocked subset.
integrity.visual_evidence: The output JSON contains a large list of participants (around 21 total), not just one or two dummy entries.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input data is located at /home/ga/pebl/data/iat_data.csv. The output must be saved to /home/ga/pebl/analysis/iat_report.json. Participant 'sub-99' is an explicit bot and must be marked as excluded ('"excluded": true') due to the >10% trials under 300ms rule. The expected 'group_mean_d_score' for valid participants is approximately 0.563 (acceptable range: 0.548 to 0.578).
